mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_model_config WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_model_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model_config SET name = #{name}, display_name = #{displayName}, type = #{type}, endpoint = #{endpoint}, api_key = #{apiKey}, model = #{model}, timeout = #{timeout}, is_default = #{isDefault}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, sort = #{sort}, config_json = #{configJson} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_model_config SET is_default = 0 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
UPDATE ai_model_config SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_model_config SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_model_config SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
